problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region may resolve What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
